items.title: Overview
items.description: The onchain protocols PND ships for artists, and how this reference is organized.

items.title: Addresses
items.description: The shared singletons of each PND onchain protocol, with ABI and reference links.

items.title: Conventions
items.description: How to read examples, addresses, and terms across this reference.

items.title: Overview
items.description: What the PND Collection System is, its parts, and how this reference is organized.

items.title: The four slots
items.description: Renderer, price strategy, mint hook, and extension minter, the swappable modules every collection composes from.

items.title: Id modes
items.description: Sequential and pooled, the two token id assignment models, fixed at init.

items.title: Mint Marks and entropy
items.description: The derived per-token provenance and the mint-time seed renderers draw from.

items.title: Types
items.description: The shared enums and structs in SurfaceTypes.sol, the data-only surface with no ABI functions of its own.

items.title: Surface
items.description: The one core of the PND Collection System: a single OpenZeppelin ERC721 that holds ownership, ETH payment paths, and per-token provenance, and nothing else.

items.title: SurfaceFactory
items.description: SurfaceFactory deploys one [Surface](/docs/collections/contracts/surface) per work as an immutable EIP-1167 clone of a fixed implementation: no proxy admin, no upgrade path, what deploys is what runs.

items.title: DefaultRenderer
items.description: The canonical built-in renderer for [Surface](/docs/collections/contracts/surface).

items.title: RenderAssets
items.description: The renderer-land registry of static display assets: each collection's shared cover image, per-token captures (thumbnails of rendered output), and a capture template that resolves per token id.

items.title: ScriptyRenderer
items.description: ScriptyRenderer is the **bring-your-own generative renderer template**: a concrete, forkable [IRenderer](/docs/collections/contracts/i-renderer) for Art Blocks-style script-based work, assembled fully onchain through ScriptyBuilderV2.

items.title: AllowlistHook
items.description: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) gating minting to a Merkle allowlist, the standard shape for a presale.

items.title: PerWalletCapHook
items.description: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) capping how many tokens any single wallet can mint from a collection, so a capped drop can't be bought out by one address in a single transaction (or across several).

items.title: HoldsSurfaceHook
items.description: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) gating a mint on the minter holding a token from another collection, typically an earlier collection by the same artist.

items.title: GateHook
items.description: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) composing a Merkle allowlist and a per-wallet cap into ONE hook.

items.title: IMintHook
items.description: IMintHook is the interface a contract implements to occupy a collection's hook slot, one of the [four swappable slots](/docs/collections/concepts/four-slots) on the [Collection](/docs/collections/contracts/collection) core.

items.title: IPriceStrategy
items.description: IPriceStrategy is the interface a contract implements to occupy a collection's price slot, one of the [four swappable slots](/docs/collections/concepts/four-slots) on the [Collection](/docs/collections/contracts/collection) core.

items.title: IRenderer
items.description: IRenderer is the interface a contract implements to occupy a collection's renderer slot, one of the [four swappable slots](/docs/collections/concepts/four-slots) on the [Surface](/docs/collections/contracts/surface) core.

items.title: ISurfaceView
items.description: ISurfaceView is the read surface a collection exposes for its swappable slots, [renderer](/docs/collections/contracts/i-renderer), [price strategy](/docs/collections/contracts/i-price-strategy), and any minter, to read without depending on the full [Surface](/docs/collections/contracts/surface) ABI.

items.title: IPreviewRenderer
items.description: IPreviewRenderer is an OPTIONAL extension a renderer implements to render what a token WOULD look like for a caller-supplied seed, without any token existing.

items.title: Deploy a collection
items.description: Call the factory to deploy an owned, immutable Surface clone, and what each config field controls.

items.title: Mint
items.description: The built-in paid mint paths, price resolution, sale windows, and the reverts to handle.

items.title: Write a minter
items.description: Implement an extension minter, get authorized via setMinter, and mint through mintTo or mintToId.

items.title: Write a price strategy
items.description: Implement IPriceStrategy's view-only priceOf, install it with setPriceStrategy, and two worked examples.

items.title: Write a mint hook
items.description: Implement IMintHook's beforeMint/afterMint, install it with setMintHook, and the three reference hooks to start from.

items.title: Write a renderer
items.description: Implement IRenderer against ISurfaceView, the bundled renderers, and how renderer locking works.

items.title: Access control
items.description: Every state-changing function in the Collections contracts and who may call it.

items.title: Errors index
items.description: Every custom error in the Collections contracts, its contract, and the condition that raises it.

items.title: Events index
items.description: Every event the Collections contracts emit, grouped by contract.

items.title: Injection convention
items.description: How a generative work's code receives its token context, onchain and off, and the determinism rules that make a preview the render.

items.title: Overview
items.description: The PND Sovereign Auction House: a per-owner, onchain English-auction house for any ERC721.

items.title: Auction lifecycle
items.description: The full path an auction takes: create and escrow, bid, extend, end, or cancel, plus refunds and the fee math.

items.title: SovereignAuctionHouse
items.description: An onchain English auction house for ERC721 tokens, denominated in ETH.

items.title: SovereignAuctionHouseFactory
items.description: SovereignAuctionHouseFactory deploys one [SovereignAuctionHouse](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house) per owner as an immutable EIP-1167 clone of a fixed implementation: no proxy admin, no upgrade path, what deploys is what runs.

items.title: Deploy an auction house
items.description: Call the factory to deploy your own per-owner auction house, and predict its address ahead of time.

items.title: Run an auction
items.description: The seller flow: approve the NFT, create one or many auctions, adjust the reserve, cancel, and end.

items.title: Bid and settle
items.description: The bidder flow: read the minimum, place a bid, handle being outbid and refunds, and settle a finished auction.

items.title: Access control
items.description: Every state-changing function in the Auctions contracts and who may call it.

items.title: Errors index
items.description: Every custom error in the Auctions contracts, its contract, and the condition that raises it.

items.title: Events index
items.description: Every event the Auctions contracts emit, grouped by contract.

items.title: ABIs and the protocol manifest
items.description: Where integrators get machine-readable data: served ABI files, the @pin/abi package, the protocol manifest, llms.txt, and the docs search index.

items.title: AI agents
items.description: Where to start as an agent or integrator: the manifest, llms.txt, per-contract ABIs, and how to discover per-owner clones through each factory.
